category_sources: source_facts.description says Knowledgebase of Interatomic Models API; official OpenKIM pages describe the KIM API as a standard for molecular simulators interfacing with interatomic models.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kim-api; official OpenKIM page title and GitHub README call it the KIM API package.
docs_sources: Official OpenKIM KIM API page links the latest release documentation on kim-api.readthedocs.io and provides the project overview page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OpenKIM KIM API page says the KIM API is under version control hosted at GitHub; official GitHub repository is openkim/kim-api.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies KIM API; official OpenKIM and GitHub README mention atomistic or molecular simulation programs, interatomic models, and C/C++/Fortran support.
